impact_analysis.mt_summary: MT-1: _safe_resolve() UNC allowlist — order_lines_reader.py only MT-2: jm default KJ — main.py only MT-3: note = kit_place — main.py only MT-4: _compress_line_nos centralized — core/utils.py new, main.py, ui/app.py MT-5: dead code removed — main.py, ui/app.py

handover.change_summary: MT-1: _ALLOWED_ROOTS list with UNC //ccikrnf/wrkgroup; _safe_resolve() updated to iterate list MT-2: jm column default "G" changed to "KJ" in main.py _cli_main MT-3: note = kit_place instead of hardcoded "포장반" in _cli_main dims_result=None branch MT-4: _compress_line_nos moved to core/utils.py; removed from main.py and ui/app.py; imports added MT-5: write_date dead code removed; inline import re as _re removed; import re added at top of ui/app.py
